message:
refactor: remove BD daemon from NTM managed services

The bd binary has been superseded by br (beads_rust) which has no daemon
mode. Remove all BD daemon management:
- DefaultSpecs() no longer includes bd daemon entry
- Doctor check no longer probes port 8767 for bd-daemon
- CLI beads daemon subcommands (start/stop/status/health/metrics) return
  beadsDaemonUnsupportedError()
- HTTP endpoints /api/v1/beads/daemon/* return 501 Not Implemented
- All tests updated to expect 501 instead of 200/500
- Monitor comment updated: "(cm, am)" instead of "(bd, cm, am)"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
